central_axis_policy.reason: train bridge is generated as the central parent plate and local bridge lobes are cut away from it

seam_policy.basis: minimum bridge plate-to-plate gap is sized to roughly the countersunk screw head diameter; construction clearance includes smoothing-loss allowance

allowed_interference_exceptions.reason: phase-level integration keeps the downloaded escapement assembly intact; below-face source details may embed into the mainplate until a production support bridge is remodeled.
allowed_interference_exceptions.scope: imported external solids or subfeatures below the reference plate lower face
